_meta.methodology: Enrichment derived from (a) spine fields and notes already captured in glass_services_spine.json by the prior sub-agent (which performed live-fetch of homepage / About pages for each business on 2026-05-16T20:00:00Z), (b) verified third-party citations referenced in those spine notes (BBB, Chamber of Commerce, OpenCorporates, BlueBook), and (c) industry heuristics for the architectural-glass services space (NAICS 238150 / 811122). Live re-fetch of TX Comptroller franchise-tax status, LinkedIn graduate-year scrapes, and GANA membership rolls is FLAGGED for the next sub-agent batch — those data sources require either credentialed API access or per-business JS-rendered pages that exceeded this batch's WebFetch reliability budget. Where owner age is estimated, the source tag describes the heuristic; where independence is confirmed, it is by inheritance from the spine's independence_verified=true field.

owner_age_heuristics_used.founded_pre_1950_third_gen: If founded pre-1950 AND spine notes confirm 3+ generations, owner is grandson/granddaughter of founder; estimate age 55-70 (median 62).
owner_age_heuristics_used.founded_pre_1980_second_gen: If founded pre-1980 AND spine notes mention son/daughter succession, current operator estimated 55-70 (median 62).
owner_age_heuristics_used.founded_1980_to_2000_original: If founded 1980-2000 and no succession language, owner is likely original founder; estimate age 60-72 (median 66). This is the highest-density 'tired owner' band.
owner_age_heuristics_used.founded_2000_to_2010_original: Founder likely 50-65 now (median 58); not yet in the prime succession window but worth tracking.
owner_age_heuristics_used.founded_post_2010: Founder likely 35-55 now; deprioritize for off-market acquisition.
owner_age_heuristics_used.explicit_succession_marker: When spine quotes 'son and son-in-law took over after founder passed' or 'succession to daughter [Name]', the successor is treated as current owner; estimate them 5-15 years younger than what original founder would be.

coasting_tells_taxonomy_used: explicit_succession_completed (NEGATIVE signal — already passed to next gen, less likely to sell)
next_batch_recommendations: Pull TX Comptroller franchise-tax status for each TX entity ID via OpenCorporates or direct comptroller.texas.gov lookup
LinkedIn enrichment for named owners (Vasquez at Ennis, Taylor at Triple T, Novak at Buffalo, Ramirez at Distinctive, Morehead at ACME) — grad year gives ±2 year owner age
GANA (Glass Association of North America) member directory check
Website wayback-machine age + Google review velocity (12-month window)

businesses.employee_count_source: heuristic_5_TX_locations_x_~9_per_location — five sites (SA, Boerne, Kerrville plus 2 others) typically run 30-60 FTE total in mixed-service operations
